title: cdli_ebl_crosswalk data payload
description: v0.65.0 — bidirectional CDLI ↔ eBL ID crosswalk. Accepts a CDLI P-number, bare CDLI integer id, or eBL museum number; returns matching pairs with confidence tagged 'native' (typed field on either upstream) or 'inferred_via_museum_number' (parsed from CDLI's museum_no when CDLI's external_resources lacks the eBL row). A CDLI join expression in museum_no (e.g. 'BM 047463 + BM 049124') expands into multiple match entries.

cdli_p_number.description: CDLI P-number (e.g. 'P396240') or null if no CDLI link exists.

cdli_integer_id.description: CDLI integer DB id (e.g. 396240) or null if no CDLI link exists.

museum_number_normalized.description: Dotted eBL form derived from input or from CDLI museum_no.

cdli_artifact_url.description: URL to the CDLI artifact landing page, or null if no CDLI link.

ebl_fragment_url.description: URL to the eBL fragmentarium landing page.

confidence.description: 'native' = link came from a typed field on either upstream API. 'inferred_via_museum_number' = CDLI lacked the eBL row, fallback parsed museum_no and the resulting candidate was verified live against eBL.
